text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I drop by the infirmary to<n>find...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did I... fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's this late?! Wh-what'sgoing on here?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, you fell asleep shortly after<n>taking the tablet I
prescribed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Although, you woke up earlier than I<n>expected...
Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No matter. Your skin, posture, the glint<n>in your
eyes—everything appears to<n>be in excellent
condition. The<n>experiment was a success!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
E-experiment? But I thought I took a<n>new type of
supplement...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And indeed you did. A brand new<n>innovation from
the mind of yours<n>truly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's the ultimate supplement! The<n>more fatigued
you are at the time of<n>ingestion, the more restful of
a sleep<n>you will have!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're my first non-rodent subject.<n>And
considering the evidence, I'd say<n>this is a huge
success.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But why?! I've still got so much to do<n>today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's far too obvious you've been<n>overexerting
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ack! Well...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: B-but I need to try harder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, slow down. I heard<n>something most
intriguing the other<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of your path, all athletes<n>are fighting an
uphill battle with their<n>physical limits, trying to
reach the top<n>of their own mountain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Comparing training to climbing a<n>mountain is rather
ingenious, I'd say.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The peak you aim for, the course you<n>choose, the
tools you use and people<n>you climb with... Timing
the trek based<n>on your condition and
environment...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You could prepare everything<n>perfectly, but what
do you think would<n>happen if you tried to climb the
whole<n>mountain without breaks?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Well... that's just an accident waiting<n>to happen, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, thus proving that thorough<n>rest leads to
prime bodybuilding!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Thorough rest, huh? If you say so,<n>Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll take care to start taking rest more<n>seriously
from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Now that's settled, we're<n>ready to
move things along to the<n>next phase.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Next... phase?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's say the supplement I first<n>prescribed you is
called "Tablet A".<n>What I'm about to inject into
you<n>now is... "Solution B".

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the lingering remnants of Tablet<n>A in your
body as a catalyst, you<n>should in theory feel even
more<n>refreshed!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No, nope, out of the question! I'm<n>done with that!
I've had plenty of<n>rest!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? If I don't<n>inject you
with the solution, the Tablet<n>A compounds in your
body will<n>explode!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Y-y-you're joking, right?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it was merely a jest. A<n>necessary act to
draw your attention.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I've already injected you with the<n>solution.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm really... getting... slee...py...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...In fact, all I did was give your arm a<n>slight poke
with my fingernail.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sweet dreams, Scarlet. Rest well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Considering you were fatigued<n>enough to fall into
slumber from a<n>mere placebo, I'd say you need it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? You there—would you care for a<n>moment of
respite?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I run off in a mad panic.
